candidates.why: Component of revenues but not the consolidated top-line; prefer explicit total revenue line instead.
Component of revenues; not the comprehensive revenue line.
Explicit total revenue line aggregating all revenue components; best representation of top-line revenue.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings measure, not revenue.
Net income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Basic income/(loss) per share in USD
candidates.why: Per-share metric, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Diluted income/(loss) per share (EPS) in USD
candidates.why: Per-share metric, not revenue.
Finance income aggregate, not operating revenue.
Balance sheet asset derived from revenue, not the revenue flow itself.
Accrued income asset, not revenue line item.
Liability; unearned revenue, not recognized revenue.

variables.notes: ‘Total revenues’ is the explicit consolidated revenue line and best top-line proxy; components like ‘Contract Sales’ and ‘Multi-client late sales’ are not used to avoid partial coverage.

candidates.row_label: Charter Hire, Fuel and Crew Expenses
candidates.why: Primary direct operating costs related to providing services (vessels, fuel, crew); best proxy for COGS.
Likely additional direct operating costs tied to revenue generation (third-party services).
Direct fuel costs associated with operations; fits COGS definition.
Mixed between direct and overhead; could include production staff but also G&A; less clean as pure COGS.

candidates.row_label: Reversal of provision to charter hire, fuel and crew expenses
candidates.why: Adjustment to provisions rather than a core recurring cost; not ideal as base COGS component.
More indicative of SG&A/overhead; better mapped under XSGA_COMPONENTS.
Likely overhead rental rather than direct production cost; better under SG&A if used.
Selling expense; SG&A not COGS.
Overhead-type expenses; better under SG&A.
Explicit SG&A, not COGS.
Financing result, not COGS.
Selling expense; SG&A not COGS.
General rental overhead; SG&A if anything, not direct cost of sales.
Balance sheet item, not period expense; not suitable as COGS row.
Liability account, not an income statement expense classification.

final_choice.row_label: Charter Hire, Fuel and Crew Expenses

variables.notes: Selected rows are the clearest direct operating cost items tied to providing services (vessels, fuel, third-party direct costs). Employee and general operating expenses are treated as SG&A/overhead instead.

candidates.why: Typical overhead/operating expense bucket; good SG&A component when explicit SG&A is sparse.
Sub-component of other operating expenses; likely SG&A-type overhead.
Explicit SG&A label; included despite preview NaNs as it may hold values in other years.
Classic SG&A component (personnel/compensation overhead).
Alternative SG&A label; included to capture possible label changes across periods.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A rows exist but appear empty in the preview, so both SG&A labels are included along with the main operating expense buckets and share-based compensation to capture overhead across all years. No totals or balancing items were selected.

candidates.why: Directly labeled R&D expense; even if preview shows NaNs, presence implies values in at least one year.

variables.notes: A dedicated ‘Research and Development’ line is present, so it is used as the R&D expense input.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line in the income statement; best core measure of interest cost.
Interest on lease liabilities; secondary interest component if main interest expense is missing for some years.
Supplemental interest expense line; included as alternative label across periods.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail on lease interest; lowest priority fallback.
Represents investment in joint ventures, not interest expense; should not be used.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Multiple interest expense labels are provided as a priority list to accommodate label changes and supplemental disclosures; joint venture interest (an asset) is not used.

candidates.row_label: Share capital, share premium and other paid-in equity
candidates.why: Represents paid-in capital but excludes reserves and retained earnings, so it is not total equity attributable to owners.
Only complete equity total available; used for book equity since no separate parent/owner equity line is provided.
Technical balancing row rather than a substantive equity measure; should not be used.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing artefact, not equity.
Represents assets/liabilities total; not pure equity.

variables.notes: No separate ‘equity attributable to owners/parent’ line exists, so ‘Total Equity’ is used for book equity. There is no indication of non-controlling interests, so BE is taken as total equity and MIB is set to [].
No balance sheet line for minority interests or non-controlling interests is present; MIB is treated as zero.
